description: Trend pullback scalper. M1 execution with M5 trend context via EMA100(M1). Session restricted to US equity open (13:30-16:00 UTC) — the only window where ES has reliable directional bias, volume, and follow-through. Max 2 trades per day. Hard stop after 2 daily losses. ATR floor 8 ticks ensures meaningful volatility at entry. Cooldown 20 bars after loss = 20-minute pause, letting regime reset. ML is a confidence veto only (threshold 0.60-0.65); it cannot generate entries.
rejection_reasons: silent_fold: min_trades_in_fold=0 < 3 — strategy is not trading consistently
pnl_cv=5.35 > 2.0 — PnL too volatile across folds
